product_title: Ultra Durable 154701001 Dishwasher Splash Shield Replacement Part by BlueStars - Exact Fit for Frigidaire & Kenmore Dishwashers - Replaces 1465007 154685101 AP4338941 PS2203346 - Pack of 2
clean_review_text: These splash shields look and fit exactly like the factory originals. The only problem I've had is that they seem to be stiffer than the original version. This is an issue because of the flawed design of the bottom rack in the Whirlpool/Maytag/etc. dishwasher where the rollers press down on the splash shields when the rack is rolled in and out to load/unload. This pressure seems to be why these splash shields fail so often. Since these don't flex as well as the originals, they are prone to be dislodged when the rack rolls over them. This can cause leakage. It can also cause the shields to fail even sooner since they don't flex as well. As a matter of interest, I recently checked the current models of the Whirlpool, etc. dishwashers and they don't use this splash shield at all but have redesigned the door and the door seal. I guess the engineers realized this was a constantly failing part.

product_title: Coorganisers Large Capacity Egg Holder for Refrigerator, 3-Layers 30 Egg Storage Container for Refrigerator Door, Clear Plastic Egg Organizer Egg Tray for Refrigerator, Reusable Fresh Egg Storage
clean_review_title: Awesome egg rack with one flaw
clean_review_text: [[VIDEOID:deb7a7b9f478e538d957cb4003f30987]] This is the egg rack that I've been looking for! It stacks vertically so it minimizes its footprint in the fridge, it holds three layers of 10 eggs each. The super cool feature I was not expecting is the shelves that hold the eggs are spring loaded and automatically fold up out of the way when that shelf is empty. The weight of a single egg is enough to keep the shelf deployed downward, as soon as the last egg is lifted it automatically folds up and out of the way to expose the next layer of eggs. It seems to be made slightly too thin plastic, I don't think it's going to last , long. Another issue is mine received a very small crack during shipping, which is not the end of the world except it is in a very vulnerable location, in the very center of the top rack., So structurally it is in the weakest part of the shelf. That's a bad spot because it could easily spread. Perhaps if they made this out of slightly heavier plastic this would not be an issue. Another flaw is that if you stack two eggs directly on top of each other they can touch, this isn't a real big problem just something I noticed.

product_title: Bath Bombs Gift Set 12 Fizzies, Shea & Coco Butter Dry Skin Moisturize, Perfect for Bubble & Spa Bath. Handmade Birthday Mothers Day Gifts idea for Her/Him, Wife, Girlfriend
clean_review_title: Small bath bombs with terrible performance & it stains my skin
clean_review_text: [[VIDEOID:491e386908deb8251c574f6eb0c8758f]] There are 12 individually wrapped smal bath bombs in this set. The fragrances are, orange, lavender, frankincense, rosemary, mint, lemongrass, vanilla, seasalt, kiwi, rose, coconut, and papaya. I tried the papaya. When it was first plunged into the water (see video) there was fizz and no suds. Before I could even put the foot bath onto the floor to bathe my feet, the entire bomb fizzed out and dissolved into tang colored water less than 30 seconds later (see photo). Also, the fragrance was hardly detectable even though they smell good in the package. Since I personally do not like the color rings caused by bath bombs in my bath, I used this in a foot bath. The water turned an orange color and that color adhered to my skin and stained my towels but did not stain my foot bath. In summary, these bombs perform terribly, are staining, and are barely fragrant in the bath. The current price of $19.99 is expensive but still competitively priced for this as it comes to $1.67 per bath bomb, which is about what I would expect to pay for bombs of this size. However, at that price, I also expect these to perform and they do not. These are super lackluster and an utter disappointment. I am surprised others rated this 4 or 5 stars. product_title: Keurig My K-Cup Reusable Coffee Filter - Old Model
clean_review_text: It's ridiculous they even sell this product. The first time I used it, water went everywhere. The second time, same deal. I called the product hotline and they knew right away how to deal with it ... an annoying repositioning of a rubber component over the needle every time you switch between the k-cup and the "my" k-cup. So finally I manage to brew without getting water all over, but the coffee is insanely weak. Pretty undrinkable after all that effort and much wasted coffee. I read up on how to "fix" this by butchering a used K-cup, and will try that to get it to work. Honestly, it shouldn't be this hard though. I really want my money back.

product_title: Pureline DA29-00020B, Replacement for Samsung DA29-00020B, Kenmore 46-9101, 469101, 9101, 4609101000, Refrigerator Water Filter.Triple Action Filtration, NSF 372 and NSF 42 Certification (6 Pack)
clean_review_text: My filters arrived very quickly (2 days). However, even though the box states the same filter # compatible with my Samsung #DA29-00020B, they do not fit. When I compared it with the filter I removed I could see the top of this filter where the opening is, is way different. I will be returning these.

clean_review_title: Sound activation of backlight does not work
clean_review_text: I am disappointed because the sound control feature does not work. The description says that you can activate the backlight by voice, but even shouting has no effect. And yes I have the switch in the proper position to permit sound activation. Clapping only works if you are within a couple inches of the product, and at that point it would simply be easier to touch it and activate it that way. This is a serious problem because when the screen is not lit up, you cannot read the data. I will be returning it.

clean_review_title: Color bled seriously during the first wash
clean_review_text: I took more than 45 minutes to do the first hand wash for this new sweater since the water kept to be hot pink for almost half hour. The quality of dyes for this sweater is not good so caused too much color bleeding. Be aware to wash it alone for the first wash since it could affect your entire load of laundry if you put it into machine with other clothes.

product_title: 24 Pieces Satin Silk Scrunchies Hair Ties Skinny Elastic Hair Bands Thin Small Ponytail Holders for Women Girls Hair Accessories (Classic Colors)
clean_review_text: These scrunchies are a mess! The ends are very clumsily put together with elastic sticking out; some scrunchies were large and some were very small (hard to put on even a child) and not usable. Threads were pulled in the fabric; some didn't look too clean. Did the manufacturer have the workers pick up end pieces and sew them together to make a scrunchy? Never could I recommend these. If it looks to good to be true, don't be fooled like I was.
